title: Iridonian field boots
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Boot}}
[[File:AgenKolarPromo.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] wearing Iridonian field boots]]

'''Iridonian field boots''' were sturdy footwear often favored by the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]] of [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] preferred to wear Iridonian field boots.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2005-04-02 -->''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]''
